'''zhachafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zalambdalestid|zalambdalestid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zalambdalestid|zalambdalestid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhachafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchæfæth|zhæchæfæth]] || [[word:zhæchæfæj|zhæchæfæj]] || [[word:zhæchæfæsh|zhæchæfæsh]] || [[word:zhæchæfæ|zhæchæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachachafath|zhachachafath]] || [[word:zhachachafaj|zhachachafaj]] || [[word:zhachachafash|zhachachafash]] || [[word:zhachachafa|zhachachafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachafath|zhachafath]] || [[word:zhachafaj|zhachafaj]] || [[word:zhachafash|zhachafash]] || [[word:zhachafa|zhachafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachaffath|zhachaffath]] || [[word:zhachaffaj|zhachaffaj]] || [[word:zhachaffash|zhachaffash]] || [[word:zhachaffaf|zhachaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachafatha|zhachafatha]] || [[word:zhachafaja|zhachafaja]] || [[word:zhachafasha|zhachafasha]] || [[word:zhachafaka|zhachafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachafath|zhachafath]] || [[word:zhachafaj|zhachafaj]] || [[word:zhachafash|zhachafash]] || [[word:zhachafa|zhachafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachafathal|zhachafathal]] || [[word:zhachafajal|zhachafajal]] || [[word:zhachafashal|zhachafashal]] || [[word:zhachafakal|zhachafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachafathatha|zhachafathatha]] || [[word:zhachafajaja|zhachafajaja]] || [[word:zhachafashasha|zhachafashasha]] || [[word:zhachafaka|zhachafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachafathan|zhachafathan]] || [[word:zhachafajan|zhachafajan]] || [[word:zhachafashan|zhachafashan]] || [[word:zhachafakan|zhachafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachafathaoro|zhachafathaoro]] || [[word:zhachafajaoro|zhachafajaoro]] || [[word:zhachafashaoro|zhachafashaoro]] || [[word:zhachafakaoro|zhachafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
